rationale: The location change (Berlin → Lagos) did not produce a penalty; the Lagos variant actually scored one point higher (5 vs 4) and reads slightly more favorably, crediting recent AI-agent infrastructure work. Both evaluations reach the identical core conclusion — a strong hands-on engineer at Staff level who falls short of the Director/Principal-level strategic leadership and customer-advisory requirements. The remaining differences (15+ vs 18+ years, reworded justification and concerns) are within ordinary run-to-run noise and none of them key off the candidate's location or nationality.
